name: Mentionlytics
description:
Mentionlytics’ strengths all lie in its name: it excels at analytics and social media monitoring. The platform gives you insights into your online presence and reputation, and is beloved for its ability to track mentions across the web, including social media, news sites, and blogs.

Here’s how it stands out from the rest:

  • Pricing starts at $39/month with a free trial, making it a relatively budget-friendly option
  • Enjoy comprehensive web and social monitoring. You can track mentions across various online platforms with ease, so you always know who’s saying what about your business, for better or for worse
  • Along with mention tracking, the platform provides stellar sentiment analysis, helping you understand the tone and meaning behind brand mentions
  • Square up against the competition with comprehensive competitor analysis. You can monitor competitors’ online presence and strategies directly on the platform, so you always know what they’ve got up their sleeve
  • Supported platforms include Facebook, Instagram, X, LinkedIn, Pinterest, news sites, and blogs

Key Features:

✅ Comprehensive Online Monitoring

✅ Sentiment Analysis

✅ Competitor Tracking
what_people_say:
What people say :

Mentionlytics is a key tool for evaluating what people really think about your brand - and gleaning insights from the data you gather. Users especially appreciate the in-depth analytics, which help in understanding public perception and engagement.

Here’s what current customers have to say:

“Mentionlytics offers great insights into our brand's online reputation, though it can be overwhelming with the amount of data. Oh well, I’d rather have too much than too little. Anyways, yeah, they provide solid insights for our team. I’m not sure we’re using the mention tracking to the fullest extent possible.”

“It’s an excellent tool for monitoring, but I’d like more tools for direct engagement with our audience.”
cta_heading: Synup Social excels with superior features and competitive price
what_it_s_lacking:
What it’s lacking:

  • 🚫 Tools for direct audience engagement
  • 🚫 Simpler data presentation for easier understanding
  • 🚫 Multi-brand management
  • 🚫 More affordable plans for small businesses
